name: Frosty Snow Berry Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 can Jellied cranberry sauce, cut into cubes
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------FROSTING----------------------------------
1. In a large bowl, combine 2 egg whites.
2. Gradually add 3/4 cup Sugar while whisking continuously.
3. Add 1/3 cup Light corn syrup, 2 tablespoons Water, 1/4 teaspoon Salt, and 1/4 teaspoon Cream of tartar to the mixture.
4. Continue whisking until stiff peaks form.
5. Stir in 1 teaspoon Vanilla extract and 6 dashes Red food coloring.
6. Set aside to cool slightly.
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Grease and flour two 8-inch round cake pans.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the dry ingredients: 2 1/4 cups Flour, 3 teaspoons Baking powder, and 1 teaspoon Salt.
4. Add the Crisco, grated lemon rind, and Milk to the dry mixture. Mix until just combined.
5. Gradually add the Egg whites mixture to the batter, alternating with the milk, ensuring each addition is fully incorporated before adding the next.
6. Fold in the Jellied cranberry sauce cubes.
7. Pour the batter evenly into the prepared pans.
8. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Allow the cakes to cool completely before frosting.
Pink Fluffy Frosting:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine 2 egg whites and 3/4 cup Sugar.
2. Cook over simmering water in a double boiler, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens enough to hold its shape.
3. Remove from heat and stir in 1/3 cup Light corn syrup, 2 tablespoons Water, 1/4 teaspoon Salt, and 1/4 teaspoon Cream of tartar.
4. Continue whisking until the mixture is smooth and glossy.
5. Stir in 1 teaspoon Vanilla extract and 6 dashes Red food coloring.
6. Allow to cool slightly before spreading on the cooled cakes.
